message:
fix(core): prefer AST-based SQL parsing in compat_persist and inject IPK for rowid tables

Upgrade parse_columns_from_create_sql, is_without_rowid_table_sql,
is_strict_table_sql, is_autoincrement_table_sql, and
extract_check_constraints_from_sql to first attempt AST-based parsing
via the real parser before falling back to regex/token heuristics.
Also fix rowid-table loading to synthesize the INTEGER PRIMARY KEY
column value from the btree rowid when it is omitted from the record.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
